theme_tagline: Every Spin is a Goal. Every Goal is Gold.
primary_hook: FIFA World Cup 2026 Round of 32 — USA, England, Belgium already advanced; Spain vs. Austria (3PM ET), Portugal vs. Croatia (7PM ET), Switzerland vs. Algeria (11PM ET)
secondary_hook: Knockout stage drama — every match matters, every moment is gold
trending_topic_details: World Cup 2026 Round of 32 knockout stage is in full swing on July 2. USA advanced 2-0 vs Bosnia, England beat Congo DR 2-1, Belgium beat Senegal 3-2. Evening matches: Spain vs Austria at 3PM ET (SoFi Stadium), Portugal vs Croatia at 7PM ET (BMO Field Toronto), Switzerland vs Algeria at 11PM ET (BC Place Vancouver). Lady E Luck connects through the tournament momentum — every match is a golden moment, every spin can be the winning kick.
content_angle: Lady E Luck is your Golden Stadium — where every spin during match day carries World Cup energy and every player is in the running for the Golden Boot jackpot.
deals_hook: Golden Boot Jackpot, Hat Trick Bonus, Penalty Kick Free Spin, Halftime Reload
avoid: specific team rivalries that could alienate fans
